title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 377.150 - Retaliatory section
text:
377.150.  Retaliatory section. — When any other state or country shall impose any obligations upon such corporation, the like obligations shall be imposed and enforced by the department of commerce and insurance of this state upon similar corporations and their agents of such state or country doing business in this state.
(RSMo 1939 § 5861) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 5750; 1919 § 6160; 1909 § 6955
